description: Replace sessionStorage-based draft order URL with Postgres-backed cart items keyed to Shopify cart token. Fixes multi-product checkout and page-refresh bugs. Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-19-server-side-cart-design.md

userStories.title: Add curtain-db Postgres container to Docker Compose
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a dedicated Postgres container for curtain-checkout-api so that cart items can be persisted independently of the PMS database.
acceptanceCriteria: Add `curtain-db` service to docker-compose.yml at technical/gitopsprod/ using image postgres:16-alpine
Service uses a named volume `curtain-db-data` for persistence
curtain-db is NOT exposed on any host port — internal Docker network only
curtain-app service has `CURTAIN_DATABASE_URL` env var: postgres://curtain:PASSWORD@curtain-db:5432/curtain
curtain-app depends_on curtain-db in compose
CURTAIN_DATABASE_URL added to /opt/inanctekstil/.env on the Hetzner server (use a strong random password)
Document the new env var in technical/curtain-checkout-api/README.md under Environment variables
userStories.notes: curtain-db service added to docker-compose.yml. CURTAIN_DATABASE_URL and CURTAIN_DB_PASSWORD must be set in /opt/inanctekstil/.env before deploying.

userStories.title: Add Postgres client, schema migration, and cleanup to curtain-checkout-api
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the curtain-checkout-api to connect to curtain-db and manage the cart_items table so that configured items can be stored and queried.
acceptanceCriteria: Add `postgres` npm package (porsager/postgres) to technical/curtain-checkout-api/package.json
Create src/db.ts that exports a `sql` client using CURTAIN_DATABASE_URL env var

On startup, run CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS cart_items with columns: id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, cart_token TEXT NOT NULL, variant_id BIGINT NOT NULL, product_title TEXT NOT NULL, en_cm INT NOT NULL, boy_cm INT NOT NULL, pile_stili TEXT NOT NULL, pile_orani DECIMAL(4,2) NOT NULL, kanat TEXT NOT NULL, kanat_count INT NOT NULL, base_price_per_meter DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL, calculated_price DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
On startup, run CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS ON cart_items(cart_token, variant_id)
Cleanup job: DELETE FROM cart_items WHERE created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' — runs on startup and every 24 hours via setInterval
If CURTAIN_DATABASE_URL is not set, server throws on startup (fail fast)
bun run typecheck passes
bun test src/ passes
userStories.notes: postgres package added, src/db.ts created with schema migration + 7-day cleanup job. tsconfig.json + typecheck script added.

userStories.title: Implement POST /api/checkout/item endpoint
userStories.description: As a customer, I want my curtain configuration to be saved server-side when I click Sepete Ekle so that my configuration survives page navigation and refresh.
acceptanceCriteria: New endpoint POST /api/checkout/item accepts: cartToken (string), variantId (number), en (number), boy (number), pileStili (string), pileOrani (number), kanat (string), kanatCount (number)
cartToken validation: present, non-empty, alphanumeric+hyphens only, max 64 chars — returns 400 MISSING_CART_TOKEN or INVALID_INPUT on failure
All other field validations match existing /api/checkout/draft-order rules
Fetches Shopify access token via client_credentials OAuth (same as existing endpoint)
Fetches variant price + product_title from Shopify REST API server-side (never trusts client price)
Calculates price: (en / 100) * pileOrani * kanatCount * basePricePerMeter
Upserts row into cart_items — on conflict (cart_token, variant_id) update all fields
Returns { ok: true, calculatedPrice: '1150.00' } on success
Returns correct error codes: INVALID_INPUT (400), MISSING_CART_TOKEN (400), VARIANT_NOT_FOUND (404), AUTH_FAILED (500), INVALID_PRICE (500), DB_ERROR (500)
CORS origin restricted to https://inanctekstil.store (replaces origin: '*' in app.ts)
Old POST /api/checkout/draft-order endpoint is removed
bun run typecheck passes
bun test src/ passes
userStories.notes: POST /api/checkout/item implemented. CORS restricted to inanctekstil.store. draft-order endpoint removed. Tests use mock.module + dynamic import pattern.

userStories.title: Implement POST /api/checkout/complete endpoint
userStories.description: As a customer, I want a single checkout URL created for all my configured curtains when I click Ödeme so that I pay the correct price for every item.
acceptanceCriteria: New endpoint POST /api/checkout/complete accepts: { cartToken: string }
Validates cartToken with same format rules as /api/checkout/item
Reads all cart_items rows for the cartToken from Postgres
Returns 404 NO_ITEMS if no rows found (interceptor will fall through to normal checkout)
Creates one Shopify Draft Order with all line items — each with correct calculated_price and properties (En, Boy, Pile Stili, Kanat, _variant_id)
checkoutUrl returned is draft_order.invoice_url (NOT draft_order.checkout_url)
On successful draft order creation, deletes all rows for this cartToken from Postgres
Returns { checkoutUrl } on success
Returns correct error codes: MISSING_CART_TOKEN (400), NO_ITEMS (404), AUTH_FAILED (500), DRAFT_ORDER_FAILED (500), DB_ERROR (500)
Rate limiting: maximum 10 requests per minute per IP (use hono/basic-auth or a simple in-memory rate limiter middleware)
bun run typecheck passes
bun test src/ passes
userStories.notes: POST /api/checkout/complete implemented. Reads cart_items rows, creates multi-item draft order, deletes rows after success, returns {checkoutUrl}. Rate limiter: 10 req/min per IP.

userStories.title: Write tests for POST /api/checkout/item and POST /api/checkout/complete
userStories.description: As a developer, I want unit and integration tests for the new endpoints so that regressions are caught automatically.
acceptanceCriteria: Tests for POST /api/checkout/item: valid request upserts row and returns calculatedPrice, missing cartToken returns 400, invalid cartToken format returns 400, variant not found returns 404, price formula correct for 200cm x2.5 x1 = 1150.00, price formula correct for 150cm x3.0 x2 = 1350.00

Tests for POST /api/checkout/complete: valid request with 2 items creates draft order with 2 line items and returns checkoutUrl, empty cart returns 404 NO_ITEMS, rows are deleted after successful draft order creation
Tests use mocked fetch (same pattern as existing app.test.ts) — no real Shopify or DB calls in unit tests
bun test src/ passes with all new tests
bun run typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Follow TDD: write failing tests first, then confirm implementation passes them. See existing test patterns in technical/curtain-checkout-api/src/app.test.ts

userStories.title: Update curtain-configurator.liquid to use /api/checkout/item
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the curtain configurator to register items server-side instead of storing a draft order URL in sessionStorage so that multi-product carts work correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Sepete Ekle handler: GET /cart.js first to obtain cartToken, then POST /api/checkout/item with { cartToken, variantId, en, boy, pileStili, pileOrani, kanat, kanatCount }
On /api/checkout/item success: proceed to POST /cart/add.js (unchanged), then open cart drawer (unchanged)
All sessionStorage.getItem and sessionStorage.setItem calls removed from the section
The checkout interceptor block (document.addEventListener capture-phase click handler) removed from this file entirely
Button loading state: shows 'Hazırlanıyor...' while /api/checkout/item request is in flight
Error handling: show Turkish error message inline if /api/checkout/item returns non-2xx
shopify theme push --theme 193714913361 --store 1z7hb1-2d.myshopify.com --only 'sections/curtain-configurator.liquid' --nodelete --path technical/theme succeeds
Verified in browser: adding TUL product does NOT store anything in sessionStorage (DevTools Application tab)
userStories.notes: Production theme ID: 193714913361. API URL: https://app.inanctekstil.store. Read technical/theme/sections/curtain-configurator.liquid before editing.

userStories.title: Add global checkout interceptor to theme layout
userStories.description: As a customer, I want checkout to work correctly from any page (product page, cart page, or elsewhere) so that my configured prices are always honoured at checkout.
acceptanceCriteria: New file technical/theme/assets/perde-checkout.js created
Intercepts clicks on checkout buttons/links via document.addEventListener capture phase: selectors a[href*='/checkout'], button[name='checkout'], input[name='checkout'], a[href*='checkouts']
On intercept: GET /cart.js → if cart empty fall through to normal checkout
POST window.PERDE_API_URL + /api/checkout/complete with { cartToken: cart.token }
If response is 404 (NO_ITEMS): fall through to normal checkout (window.location.href = btn.href || '/checkout')
If response is ok: window.location.href = checkoutUrl
Shows a loading indicator or disables the button while the request is in flight to prevent double-clicks
layout/theme.liquid has <script>window.PERDE_API_URL = 'https://app.inanctekstil.store';</script> before </body>
layout/theme.liquid has <script src="{{ 'perde-checkout.js' | asset_url }}" defer></script> before </body>
shopify theme push --theme 193714913361 --store 1z7hb1-2d.myshopify.com --only 'assets/perde-checkout.js' --only 'layout/theme.liquid' --nodelete --path technical/theme succeeds
Verified in browser via Playwright: checkout from /cart page now redirects to draft order URL (not base price checkout)
userStories.notes: Production theme ID: 193714913361. Read technical/theme/layout/theme.liquid before editing.

userStories.title: Deploy curtain-checkout-api with curtain-db and verify end-to-end
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the new server-side cart deployed to production and verified so that multi-product checkout works for real customers.
acceptanceCriteria: curtain-db container running on Hetzner: docker compose up -d curtain-db in /opt/inanctekstil/
curtain-app redeployed with new code and CURTAIN_DATABASE_URL env var: docker compose up -d --build curtain-app
Health check passes: curl https://app.inanctekstil.store/health returns {status:'ok'}
E2E test via Playwright: add STN (150cm x Boru Pile x Cift Kanat) via configurator — cart shows 1,350 TL
E2E test: navigate to TUL product page (does NOT clear DB rows), add TUL (200cm x Kanun Pile x Tek Kanat) — cart shows 2 items
E2E test: click Odeme from /cart page — checkout URL is a Draft Order URL (not /checkout)
E2E test: checkout shows both items — Saten Perde 1,350 TL and BORNOVA Tul Perde 1,150 TL — total 2,500 TL
E2E test: page refresh between add-to-cart and checkout does NOT lose configured items
Update curtain-checkout-api README.md Manual E2E Test Guide to reflect the new multi-product flow
userStories.notes: Server: ssh -i ~/.ssh/inanctekstil root@5.75.165.158. Deploy: scp -r -i ~/.ssh/inanctekstil src package.json tsconfig.json root@5.75.165.158:/opt/curtain-checkout-api/ then docker compose up -d --build curtain-app in /opt/inanctekstil/
